mapper.insert: INSERT INTO objects (id, bucket, key, etag, size, content_type, acl) VALUES ( gen_random_uuid(), #{bucket}, #{key}, #{etag}, #{size}, #{contentType}, #{acl} ) ON CONFLICT (bucket, key) DO UPDATE SET etag = EXCLUDED.etag, size = EXCLUDED.size, content_type = EXCLUDED.content_type, acl = EXCLUDED.acl, updated_at = now()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM objects WHERE bucket = #{bucket}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(size), 0) FROM objects WHERE bucket = #{bucket}
SELECT DISTINCT bucket FROM objects ORDER BY bucket
